01How it works

A research panel that answers in hours, not weeks

Build your segments

Calibrated persona models from your first-party data — every audience cell you actually target, not census averages.

Test every variant

Expose creative, pricing, or positioning to the panel and get ranked preference with confidence intervals per segment.

Ship with evidence

Verbatim-style reactions explain the why, so the deck you take to the CMO argues itself.

02Results

Pilots called the in-market winner every time

Across three enterprise pilots, simulated preference rankings matched in-market results in every campaign — and flagged one failing hero asset before $340k of media went behind it.

"The simulation caught in four hours what our panel would have told us three weeks after launch."
